Section 9.2, Tracing Payments to Corporate Creditors (Electronic Remittances)
For financial institutions enrolled in Central1âs BPRP, trace requests for their own Corporate Creditorsâ electronic payments can be initiated only if the payments originate from Central 1.
For financial institutions with clients enrolled in BPRP services, they must directly contact the Direct Clearer for any trace or return requests using Form 10015.
